expectations.text: Output is a single self-contained HTML file that opens in a browser with no build step
expectations.evidence: Single dashboard.html, Chart.js via CDN only.

expectations.text: Includes KPI cards for Total Sales and Customers
expectations.evidence: KPI cards for Total Sales ($15,880) and Customers (20), per agent report.

expectations.text: Includes a visual showing progress toward the $16,000 sales goal (progress bar or equivalent)
expectations.evidence: Header badge showing 99.3% of goal plus a progress bar on the Total Sales KPI card against the $16,000 goal.

expectations.text: Includes a category breakdown chart (e.g. doughnut or bar) across the 4 product categories
expectations.evidence: Bar chart of revenue by the 4 product categories present (category_mentions=4 in output).

expectations.text: Includes a per-store table or chart with all 4 stores, flagging Airport Kiosk as At Risk / underperforming
expectations.evidence: Store performance table with all 4 stores, share-of-total bars, and color-coded status pills; Airport Kiosk flagged At Risk.

expectations.text: Numeric values (sales, goal) are human-formatted with currency symbols
expectations.evidence: Values shown as '$15,880' etc with currency formatting.
